```{r}
rgnb_acq_unique$cogsum_bl <- as.numeric(rgnb_acq_unique$cogsum_bl)
var_label(rgnb_acq_unique$cogsum_bl) <- "Cognitive Sum Score"

rgnb_uni_a <- rgnb_acq_unique %>%
  dplyr::select(Age,
                Sex,
                Race,
                gnbr_p_cat,
                gnbr_env_cat,
                antibiotic_bl,
                deviceuse, 
                openwound_final,
                cogsum_bl,
                horgnb_bl,
                psmscore_cat,
                charlson_cat,
                hospstay_cat,
                Persistence,
                Diabetes,
                ccshemi_bl,
                Hands_only
) %>%
  tbl_summary(by = Persistence, # stratify by persistence
              statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})", #use mean and standard deviation for continuous variables
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"), #use count and percentage for categorical variables
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 2), #adds no decimal places to counts and one decimal to percentages
                            all_continuous() ~ 1), #adds one decimal place to mean and sd values
              missing = "no"
              #missing_text = "Missing (n)"
              ) %>%
  add_p(pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 2)) %>% #adds p value
  add_overall() %>% #adds column with non-stratified summary statistics
  modify_header(label ~ "**Variable**") %>% #the asterisks bold the label
  modify_spanning_header(c("stat_1", "stat_2") ~ "**Persistence**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  as_gt() %>% 
  tab_header(
    title = "Table 4. Variables associated with RGNB persistence in New Acquisition patient"
    ) %>% 
  tab_style(cell_borders(
    sides = c("top"), style = "hidden"),
    locations = cells_title())

# View the table
rgnb_uni_a
```
## MRSA Univariate_Acquisition
```{r}
#| label: MRSA univariate analysis_acquisition
# Colonization MRSA Univariate Table (Crude)
mrsa_acq_unique$Hands_only <- as.character(mrsa_acq_unique$Hands_only)

mrsa_acq_unique$Age <- as.numeric(mrsa_acq_unique$age_bl)
mrsa_acq_unique$cogsum <- as.numeric(mrsa_acq_unique$cogsum_bl)
var_label(mrsa_acq_unique$cogsum) <- "Cognitive Sum Score"

mrsa_uni_a <- mrsa_acq_unique %>%
  dplyr::select(Age,
                Sex,
                Race,
                mrsa_p_cat,
                mrsa_env_cat,
                antibiotic_bl,
                deviceuse, 
                openwound_final,
                cogsum,
                homrsa_bl,
                psmscore_cat,
                charlson_cat,
                hospstay_cat,
                Persistence,
                Diabetes,
                ccschf_bl,
                Hands_only
) %>%
  tbl_summary(by = Persistence, # stratify by persistence
              type = list(cogsum ~ "continuous"), # explicitly set cogsum as continuous
              statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})", #use mean and standard deviation for continuous variables
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"), #use count and percentage for categorical variables
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 2), #adds no decimal places to counts and one decimal to percentages
                            all_continuous() ~ 1), #adds one decimal place to mean and sd values
              missing = "no"
              #missing_text = "Missing (n)"
              ) %>%
  add_p(pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 2)) %>% #adds p value
  add_overall() %>% #adds column with non-stratified summary statistics
  modify_header(label ~ "**Variable**") %>% #the asterisks bold the label
  modify_spanning_header(c("stat_1", "stat_2") ~ "**Persistence**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  as_gt() %>% 
  tab_header(
    title = "Table 4. Variables associated with MRSA persistence in New Acquisition patient"
    ) %>% 
  tab_style(cell_borders(
    sides = c("top"), style = "hidden"),
    locations = cells_title())

# View the table
mrsa_uni_a
```
## VRE Univariate_Acquisition
```{r}
#| label: VRE univariate analysis_acquisition
vre_acq_unique$Hands_only <- as.character(vre_acq_unique$Hands_only)

vre_acq_unique$Age <- as.numeric(vre_acq_unique$age_bl)
vre_acq_unique$cogsum <- as.numeric(vre_acq_unique$cogsum_bl)
var_label(vre_acq_unique$cogsum) <- "Cognitive Sum Score"

vre_uni_a <- vre_acq_unique %>%
  dplyr::select(Age,
                Sex,
                Race,
                vre_p_cat,
                vre_env_cat,
                antibiotic_bl,
                deviceuse, 
                openwound_final,
                cogsum,
                hovre_bl,
                psmscore_cat,
                charlson_cat,
                hospstay_cat,
                Persistence,
                Diabetes,
                ccschf_bl,
                Hands_only
) %>%
  tbl_summary(by = Persistence, # stratify by persistence
              type = list(cogsum ~ "continuous"), # explicitly set cogsum as continuous
              statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})", #use mean and standard deviation for continuous variables
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"), #use count and percentage for categorical variables
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 2), #adds no decimal places to counts and one decimal to percentages
                            all_continuous() ~ 1), #adds one decimal place to mean and sd values
              missing = "no"
              #missing_text = "Missing (n)"
              ) %>%
  add_p(pvalue_fun = ~style_pvalue(.x, digits = 2)) %>% #adds p value
  add_overall() %>% #adds column with non-stratified summary statistics
  modify_header(label ~ "**Variable**") %>% #the asterisks bold the label
  modify_spanning_header(c("stat_1", "stat_2") ~ "**Persistence**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  as_gt() %>% 
  tab_header(
    title = "Table 4. Variables associated with VRE persistence in New Acquisition patient"
    ) %>% 
  tab_style(cell_borders(
    sides = c("top"), style = "hidden"),
    locations = cells_title())

# View the table
vre_uni_a
```

# Table 5: Multivariate for Persistence
## Stepwise - Colonization
```{r}
#| label: RGNB_Colonization
# Multivariate logistic models
# Load necessary libraries
library(MASS)
library(dplyr)

# Define the variables to check for missing values
variables_to_check <- c("age_bl", "BMI", "gender", "race", "cogsum_bl", "deviceuse", "charlson_cat", 
                        "horgnb_bl", "antibiotic_bl", "openwound_final", "hospstay")

# Subset the data to remove rows with missing values in the specified variables
rgnb_unique_c_complete <- rgnb_pre_unique[complete.cases(rgnb_unique_c[, variables_to_check]), ]

# Define the initial full model with all potential risk factors for RGNB
rgnb_full_model_c <- glm(persistence ~ age_bl + BMI + gender + race + cogsum_bl + deviceuse + charlson_cat + horgnb_bl + antibiotic_bl + openwound_final + hospstay + psmscore,
                        data = rgnb_unique_c_complete, 
                        family = binomial)

# Perform stepwise regression for MRSA
rgnb_stepwise_model_c <- stepAIC(rgnb_full_model_c, direction = "both", trace = FALSE)

# Summary of the final MRSA model
summary(rgnb_stepwise_model_c)

# Extract and print final coefficients for MRSA
rgnb_final_coefficients <- summary(rgnb_stepwise_model_c)$coefficients
print(rgnb_final_coefficients)
```
## Multivariate - New Acquisition
```{r}
#| label: multivariate analysis_New acquisition
# Multivariate logistic models
model_rgnb_a <- glm(persistence ~ age_bl + gender + deviceuse + urincath + ccshemi_bl + ccsmsrd_bl, 
                   data = rgnb_unique_a, 
                   family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(model_rgnb_a)

model_mrsa_a <- glm(persistence ~ age_bl + gender + hospstay, 
                   data = mrsa_unique_a, 
                   family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(model_mrsa_a)

model_vre_a <- glm(persistence ~ age_bl + BMI + gender + vre_p + ccschf_bl, 
                   data = vre_unique_a, 
                   family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(model_vre_a)
```

# Figure 3.Survival analysis
## New Acquisition
```{r}
# Combine persistence, duration, and clearance into a unified format
combined_long <- combined_unique_a %>%
  mutate(
    Persistence = case_when(
      organism == "RGNB" ~ rgnb_acq_persistence,
      organism == "MRSA" ~ mrsa_acq_persistence,
      organism == "VRE" ~ vre_acq_persistence
    ),
    Duration = case_when(
      organism == "RGNB" ~ rgnb_acq_duration,
      organism == "MRSA" ~ mrsa_acq_duration,
      organism == "VRE" ~ vre_acq_duration
    ),
    Clearance = case_when(
      organism == "RGNB" ~ rgnb_acq_cleared,
      organism == "MRSA" ~ mrsa_acq_cleared,
      organism == "VRE" ~ vre_acq_cleared
    )
  )

combined_long <- combined_long %>%
  filter(mrsa_acq_totvisits_r > 5 |
         rgnb_acq_totvisits_r > 5 |
         vre_acq_totvisits_r > 5)

# Filter for persistence data
persistence_a <- combined_long %>%
  filter(Persistence == "Persistent")

persistence_a$Duration <- as.numeric(persistence_a$Duration)

# Create a survival object
surv_a <- Surv(time = persistence_a$Duration, 
               event = persistence_a$Clearance == "Yes")

# Fit the Kaplan-Meier model
km_curve_a <- survfit(surv_a ~ organism, data = persistence_a)
summary(km_curve_a)
survdiff(surv_a ~ organism, data = persistence_a)

# Plot the Kaplan-Meier curve
gg_surv_a <- ggsurvplot(km_curve_a, 
           data = persistence_a,
           pval = TRUE,
           pval.method = TRUE,
           pval.coord = c(0, 0.1), # position the p-value on the plot
           pval.method.coord = c(0, 0.15), # position the method p-value on the plot
           ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
           # risk.table = TRUE,       # To show the risk table
           # risk.table.col = "strata",# Change risk table color by groups
           legend.labs = c("MRSA", "RGNB", "VRE"), # Change group labels
           legend.title = "Organism",
           xlab = "Clearance of colonization (days)",
           ylab = "Probability of MDROs Persistence",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve for New Acquisition Residents"
)

# Print the plot
print(gg_surv_a)

# Save the plot by extracting the ggplot component
ggsave(file = "survival_1.png", plot = gg_surv_a$plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)


# Calculate median survival times
median_surv_a <- surv_median(km_curve_a)
median_surv_a

# Add median survival times to the plot
# medians <- median_surv$median
#for(i in 1:nrow(median_surv)) {
#  gg_surv$plot <- gg_surv$plot +
#    annotate("text", x = medians[i], y = 0.5, label = #paste("Median:", round(medians[i], 2)),
#             color = "black", vjust = -1) # Adjust color and vjust as needed
#}

# Extract survival probabilities at specific times (e.g., 50 and 100 days)
# surv_probs <- summary(km_curve_a, times = c(50, 100))
# print(surv_probs)

# Add survival probabilities to the plot
# for (i in 1:length(km_curve_a$strata)) {
#  organism_name <- names(km_curve_a$strata)[i]
#  prob_50 <- surv_probs$surv[which(surv_probs$strata == organism_name & surv_probs$time == 50)]
#  prob_100 <- surv_probs$surv[which(surv_probs$strata == organism_name & surv_probs$time == 100)]

#  gg_surv$plot <- gg_surv$plot +
 #   annotate("text", x = 50, y = prob_50, label = paste(organism_name, "50 days:", round(prob_50, 2)),
  #           color = "black", vjust = -1, hjust = 0) +
   # annotate("text", x = 100, y = prob_100, label = paste(organism_name, "100 days:", round(prob_100, 2)),
    #         color = "black", vjust = -1, hjust = 0)

# Load cowplot library
library(cowplot)

# Assemble the components manually
combined_plot <- cowplot::plot_grid(
     gg_surv_a$plot,
     gg_surv_a$table,
     ncol = 1,
     rel_heights = c(3, 1)  # Adjust the heights as needed
 )
 
 # Save the combined plot
ggsave(filename = "survival_1.png", plot = combined_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)
#}
```
### Split Acquisition
```{r}
# Create subsets for each organism
persistence_rgnb_a <- subset(persistence_a, organism == "RGNB")
persistence_mrsa_a <- subset(persistence_a, organism == "MRSA")
persistence_vre_a <- subset(persistence_a, organism == "VRE")

# Kaplan-Meier analysis for RGNB
surv_rgnb_a <- Surv(time = persistence_rgnb_a$duration, event = persistence_rgnb_a$cleared == "Yes")
km_curve_rgnb_a <- survfit(surv_rgnb_a ~ 1)
summary(km_curve_rgnb_a)
ggsurvplot(km_curve_rgnb_a, 
           data = persistence_rgnb_a,
           ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
           xlab = "Clearance of colonization (days)",
           ylab = "Probability of MDROs Persistence",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve for RGNB Residents",
           legend = "none"
)

# Kaplan-Meier analysis for MRSA
surv_mrsa_a <- Surv(time = persistence_mrsa_a$duration, event = persistence_mrsa_a$cleared == "Yes")
km_curve_mrsa_a <- survfit(surv_mrsa_a ~ 1)
summary(km_curve_mrsa_a)
ggsurvplot(km_curve_mrsa_a, 
           data = persistence_mrsa_a,
           ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
           xlab = "Clearance of colonization (days)",
           ylab = "Probability of MDROs Persistence",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve for MRSA Residents",
           legend = "none"
)

# Kaplan-Meier analysis for VRE
surv_vre_a <- Surv(time = persistence_vre_a$duration, event = persistence_vre_a$cleared == "Yes")
km_curve_vre_a <- survfit(surv_vre_a ~ 1)
summary(km_curve_vre_a)
ggsurvplot(km_curve_vre_a, 
           data = persistence_vre_a,
           ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
           xlab = "Clearance of colonization (days)",
           ylab = "Probability of MDROs Persistence",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve for VRE Residents",
           legend = "none"
)

# Cox proportional hazards model for RGNB
cox_rgnb_a <- coxph(surv_rgnb_a ~ age_bl + gender, data = persistence_rgnb_a)
summary(cox_rgnb_a)
exp(cbind(coef(cox_rgnb_a), confint(cox_rgnb_a)))
cox.zph(cox_rgnb_a)
plot(cox.zph(cox_rgnb_a))

# Cox proportional hazards model for VRE
cox_vre_a <- coxph(surv_vre_a ~ age_bl + gender, data = persistence_vre_a)
summary(cox_vre_a)
exp(cbind(coef(cox_vre_a), confint(cox_vre_a)))
cox.zph(cox_vre_a)
plot(cox.zph(cox_vre_a))
```

## Colonization
```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(survival)
library(ranger)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggfortify)
library(survminer)

# Combine persistence, duration, and clearance into a unified format
combined_long_c <- combined_unique_c %>%
  mutate(
    Persistence = case_when(
      organism == "RGNB" ~ rgnb_pre_persistence,
      organism == "MRSA" ~ mrsa_pre_persistence,
      organism == "VRE" ~ vre_pre_persistence
    ),
    Duration = case_when(
      organism == "RGNB" ~ rgnb_pre_duration,
      organism == "MRSA" ~ mrsa_pre_duration,
      organism == "VRE" ~ vre_pre_duration
    ),
    Clearance = case_when(
      organism == "RGNB" ~ rgnb_pre_cleared,
      organism == "MRSA" ~ mrsa_pre_cleared,
      organism == "VRE" ~ vre_pre_cleared
    )
  )

# Filter for persistence data
combined_long_c <- combined_long_c %>%
  filter(mrsa_pre_totvisits_r > 5 |
         rgnb_pre_totvisits_r > 5 |
         vre_pre_totvisits_r > 5)

persistence_c <- combined_long_c %>%
  filter(Persistence == "Persistent")

persistence_c$Duration <- as.numeric(persistence_c$Duration)

# Create a survival object
surv_c <- Surv(time = persistence_c$Duration, 
             event = persistence_c$Clearance == "Yes")

# Fit the Kaplan-Meier model
km_curve_c <- survfit(surv_c ~ organism, data = persistence_c)
summary(km_curve_c)
survdiff(surv_c ~ organism, data = persistence_c)

# Plot the Kaplan-Meier curve
gg_surv_c <- ggsurvplot(km_curve_c, 
           data = persistence_c,
           pval = TRUE,
           pval.method = TRUE,
           pval.coord = c(0, 0.1), # position the p-value on the plot
           pval.method.coord = c(0, 0.15), # position the method p-value on the plot
           ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
           # conf.int = TRUE,
           # risk.table = TRUE,       # To show the risk table
           # risk.table.col = "strata",# Change risk table color by groups
           legend.labs = c("MRSA", "RGNB", "VRE"), # Change group labels
           legend.title = "Organism",
           xlab = "Clerance of colonization (days)",
           ylab = "Probability of MDROs Persistnece",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve for Preexisting Colonization Residents"
)

# Calculate median survival times
median_surv_c <- surv_median(km_curve_c)
median_surv_c

# Add median survival times to the plot
# medians <- median_surv$median
#for(i in 1:nrow(median_surv)) {
#  gg_surv$plot <- gg_surv$plot +
#    annotate("text", x = medians[i], y = 0.5, label = #paste("Median:", round(medians[i], 2)),
#             color = "black", vjust = -1) # Adjust color and vjust as needed
#}

# Extract survival probabilities at specific times (e.g., 50 and 100 days)
# surv_probs <- summary(km_curve_a, times = c(50, 100))
# print(surv_probs)

# Add survival probabilities to the plot
# for (i in 1:length(km_curve_a$strata)) {
#  organism_name <- names(km_curve_a$strata)[i]
#  prob_50 <- surv_probs$surv[which(surv_probs$strata == organism_name & surv_probs$time == 50)]
#  prob_100 <- surv_probs$surv[which(surv_probs$strata == organism_name & surv_probs$time == 100)]

#  gg_surv$plot <- gg_surv$plot +
 #   annotate("text", x = 50, y = prob_50, label = paste(organism_name, "50 days:", round(prob_50, 2)),
  #           color = "black", vjust = -1, hjust = 0) +
   # annotate("text", x = 100, y = prob_100, label = paste(organism_name, "100 days:", round(prob_100, 2)),
    #         color = "black", vjust = -1, hjust = 0)
#}

# Print the plot
print(gg_surv_c)
# Load cowplot library
library(cowplot)
 
# Assemble the components manually
combined_plot_c <- cowplot::plot_grid(gg_surv_c$plot, 
                                    gg_surv_c$table,
                                    ncol = 1,
                                    rel_heights = c(3, 1)  # Adjust the heights as needed
                                    )

# Save the combined plot
ggsave(filename = "survival_2.png", plot = combined_plot_c, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)

# Cox proportional hazard
cox_c <- coxph(surv_c ~ organism, data = persistence_c)
summary(cox_c)
# Hazard Ratios (95% CI)
exp(cbind(coef(cox_c),coefci(cox_c)))
cox.zph(cox_c) # tests whether the hazards are proportional each variable separately
plot(cox.zph(cox_c)) # Check assumptions
```
### Split Colonization
```{r}
persistence_rgnb_c <- subset(persistence_c, organism == "RGNB")
persistence_mrsa_c <- subset(persistence_c, organism == "MRSA")
persistence_vre_c <- subset(persistence_c, organism == "VRE")

# Kaplan-Meier analysis for RGNB
surv_rgnb_c <- Surv(time = persistence_rgnb_c$duration, event = persistence_rgnb_c$cleared == "Yes")
km_curve_rgnb_c <- survfit(surv_rgnb_c ~ 1)
summary(km_curve_rgnb_c)
ggsurvplot(km_curve_rgnb_c, 
           data = persistence_rgnb_c,
           ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
           xlab = "Clearance of colonization (days)",
           ylab = "Probability of MDROs Persistence",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve for RGNB Residents",
           legend = "none"
)

# Kaplan-Meier analysis for MRSA
surv_mrsa_c <- Surv(time = persistence_mrsa_c$duration, event = persistence_mrsa_c$cleared == "Yes")
km_curve_mrsa_c <- survfit(surv_mrsa_c ~ 1)
summary(km_curve_mrsa_c)
ggsurvplot(km_curve_mrsa_c, 
           data = persistence_mrsa_c,
           ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
           xlab = "Clearance of colonization (days)",
           ylab = "Probability of MDROs Persistence",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve for MRSA Residents",
           legend = "none"
)

# Kaplan-Meier analysis for VRE
surv_vre_c <- Surv(time = persistence_vre_c$duration, event = persistence_vre_c$cleared == "Yes")
km_curve_vre_c <- survfit(surv_vre_c ~ 1)
summary(km_curve_vre_c)
ggsurvplot(km_curve_vre_c, 
           data = persistence_vre_c,
           ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
           xlab = "Clearance of colonization (days)",
           ylab = "Probability of MDROs Persistence",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve for VRE Residents",
           legend = "none"
)

# Cox proportional hazards model for RGNB
cox_rgnb_c <- coxph(surv_rgnb_c ~ age_bl + gender, data = persistence_rgnb_c)
summary(cox_rgnb_c)
exp(cbind(coef(cox_rgnb_c), confint(cox_rgnb_c)))
cox.zph(cox_rgnb_c)
plot(cox.zph(cox_rgnb_c))

# Cox proportional hazards model for MRSA
cox_mrsa_c <- coxph(surv_mrsa_c ~ age_bl + gender, data = persistence_mrsa_c)
summary(cox_mrsa_c)
exp(cbind(coef(cox_mrsa_c), confint(cox_mrsa_c)))
cox.zph(cox_mrsa_c)
plot(cox.zph(cox_mrsa_c))

# Cox proportional hazards model for VRE
cox_vre_c <- coxph(surv_vre_c ~ age_bl + gender, data = persistence_vre_c)
summary(cox_vre_c)
exp(cbind(coef(cox_vre_c), confint(cox_vre_c)))
cox.zph(cox_vre_c)
plot(cox.zph(cox_vre_c))
```
